Class Version

java.lang.Object
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.dvs.Version
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Version>
public class Version extends Object implements Comparable<Version>
The in-code representation of version IDs (e.g. 1.4 or 1.2-alpha).

Each version is defined by a Pattern and an array of cursors, each corresponding to one pattern Segment. A cursor represents the index of the element of that Segment which is forming the version ID and each time any cursor changes, the ID representation is rebuilt and cached.

  • Method Details

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Version o)
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<Version>

    • getCursor

      public int getCursor(int index)
      Returns the cursor corresponding to pattern segment at the given index. The given index must be >= 0, simultaneously less than the amount of segments defining the pattern.

      The returned cursor is guaranteed to be >= 0 and less than the corresponding segment's length.

      Parameters:
      index - the index of the cursor to return
      Returns:
      the cursor

    • next

      public void next()
      Moves to the next version (accordingly to the pattern).

      More formally, shifts the cursor of the least significant segment (on the right). If it was the last element in the segment's definition, resets the cursor to 0 (first element) and shifts the cursor of 2nd least significant part (just to the left) the same way.

      For example, 1.2 -> 1.3 (depending on the pattern configuration, just for illustration).

    • asID

      public String asID()
      Returns the version as an ID (for example "1.2", "5" etc. according to the pattern).
      Returns:
      the version as an ID

    • copy

      public Version copy()
      Creates a copy of this version object. The new object does not keep reference to this one in any means except the pattern, which is shared between them.

      More formally, only makes a shallow copy of the cursor indexes.

      Returns:
      the new, copied version object

    • getPattern

      public Pattern getPattern()
      Returns the versions' pattern (was also used to parse the version).
      Returns:
      the versions' pattern

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
